target.title: Doctor: expose tool result cap findings
target.body:
## Summary
- add default-disabled structured lint findings for `core/doctor/tool-result-cap`
- map existing toolResultMaxChars advice into warning findings with stable path/target/fixHint metadata
- keep legacy `openclaw doctor` note output as the authority for normal Doctor runs

## Public contract
- No public SDK, plugin manifest, config schema, or persisted data-model contract changes.
- The structured check is opt-in via `defaultEnabled: false`; default `doctor --lint` skips it while `--all` and `--only core/doctor/tool-result-cap` include it.
- No repair path is added.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (56 tests)
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.ts src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.ts src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 pnpm check:changed`
- `node scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.mjs --check`
- `node scripts/check-plugin-sdk-exports.mjs`

## Real behavior proof
Source CLI proof with isolated `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH` containing `agents.defaults.contextLimits.toolResultMaxChars = 16000`:

- default `pnpm --silent openclaw doctor --lint --json`: `checksRun: 25`, `checksSkipped: 8`, `toolResultCapFindings: 0`
- explicit `pnpm --silent openclaw doctor --lint --json --only core/doctor/tool-result-cap`: `checksRun: 1`, `checksSkipped: 32`, finding path `agents.defaults.contextLimits.toolResultMaxChars`, target `agents.defaults`, severity `warning`

## Notes
`pnpm check:changed` first tried to delegate to Blacksmith Testbox and was blocked by the local Crabbox binary version (`0.15.0`, requires `>=0.22.0`), so I ran the documented local child path directly with `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1`.


## Update: inherited default cap coverage
Addressed ClawSweeper's P2 inherited-default finding at head `2fe869cb10d049c18fdb4765906042cc01d3e8a5`:

- structured lint now includes configured agents when `agents.defaults.contextLimits.toolResultMaxChars` is set, matching the legacy Doctor target enumeration
- inherited per-agent findings use path `agents.defaults.contextLimits.toolResultMaxChars` with the agent-specific target, e.g. `agents.writer`
- added a focused regression where an agent inherits the defaults cap while using its own larger model

Additional validation after the fix:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (57 tests)
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.ts src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 pnpm check:changed`
- `node scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.mjs --check`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: giodl73-repo
